name: Boutique Newcity Public Company Limited
summary: Boutique Newcity Public Company Limited engages in the retail of garments in Thailand. It operates through four segments: Domestic Retail, Online, Foreign Retail, and Uniform. The company engages in retail and wholesale trade, foreign wholesale trade, import, design service, and uniform dressmaking for domestic and foreign companies and organizations. It offers its products under the GSP, JOUSSE, C&D, LOF-FI-CIEL, STEPHANIE, GUY LAROCHE, ADOLFO DOMINGUEZ, AMAZE, MIMI, UNIFORM SPECIALIZER, and UNIFORM MEDGRADE brands through 41 branch shops, 38 selling points in department/ shopping stores, as well provides products in 13 places in AEC neighboring countries. The company also operates A'MAZE, a multi-brand store, which offers apparel products from various brands. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
